svg.title: Chat App HLD with Fallback Mechanisms
svg.desc: Complete WhatsApp-style chat application high-level design including all fallback and crash recovery paths for WebSocket, Kafka, Redis, Cassandra, and service failures.

g.text: JWT auth, sticky sessions, route to WS node
Sticky session: user always hits same WS node

svg.text: — fallback zone 1: WebSocket / load balancer crash —

g.text: Crash scenario A — WS node or LB failure
Validate: user is member of chatId?
ACK back to Alice: received by server

svg.text: — fallback zone 2: message write / broker failure —

g.text: Crash scenario B — Cassandra or Kafka failure
For each recipient: check Presence service
Pushed to Alice via her WebSocket

svg.text: — fallback zone 3: delivery service / Redis crash —

g.text: Crash scenario C — Redis or delivery service failure
2. Client uploads direct to S3 (bypasses chat)
4. CDN URL sent as message via Chat Service
Crash scenario D — S3 or media service failure
Client retries with same presigned URL
Per member: check presence → route to WS
<256 members: fan-out on write | large: on read

svg.text: — fallback zone 5: group fan-out / presence crash —

g.text: Crash scenario E — group service or presence outage
